panelError: The “{{title}}” panel hit an error and was unloaded.

account.signInBlurb: Sign in to back up and sync your files, garage and notes across devices. Everything here still works offline against this device — Cloud Sync is optional.
account.offlineSignIn: You're offline — sign-in needs a connection.
account.offlinePending_one: {{count}} change saved locally — they'll sync when you reconnect.
account.offlinePending_other: {{count}} changes saved locally — they'll sync when you reconnect.
account.offlineNoPending: Changes are saved locally and will sync when you reconnect.
account.nameProfanity: Please choose a cleaner display name.

plan.title: Plan
plan.upgrade: Upgrade from the Plans & pricing cards.
plan.comp: Complimentary plan — courtesy of the team.
plan.trimWarning_one: Free access ended — cloud logs trim to the free tier in {{count}} day (on {{date}}). Subscribe to keep them.
plan.trimWarning_other: Free access ended — cloud logs trim to the free tier in {{count}} days (on {{date}}). Subscribe to keep them.
plan.trimmed: Cloud logs over the free tier have been trimmed. Subscribe to restore the higher limit.

storage.title: Storage
storage.localNote: Measured against this device's storage. Sign in to back it up to the cloud.
storage.cloudNote: Garage data and snapshots always sync, even when you're full — they still count toward your storage, but only logs stop syncing when the cap is reached.
storage.overLimit: You're over your plan's storage. New cloud syncs are saved locally until you free up space or upgrade.

dataPrivacy.exportBlurbSignedIn: Download a copy of everything we hold about you — your account data plus the data stored in this browser — as a ZIP. This is your right to access and portability.
dataPrivacy.exportBlurbSignedOut: Download a copy of everything we hold about you — the data stored in this browser — as a ZIP. This is your right to access and portability.
dataPrivacy.exportDownloaded: Your data export has been downloaded.
dataPrivacy.scheduledNotice: Your account and all its data are scheduled for permanent deletion on {{when}}. You can cancel any time before then.
dataPrivacy.deleteBlurb: Deletes your account and everything stored under it (profile, synced files, garage data, subscription record). To protect against a hijacked session, we email you a code first and then wait 7 days before erasing anything — you can cancel during that time. Data stored only in this browser is not removed by this; clear it from your browser settings.
dataPrivacy.offlineDelete: You're offline — account deletion needs a connection.
dataPrivacy.emailedCode: We emailed a confirmation code to {{email}}.
dataPrivacy.codeFailed: That code didn't work — try again.

snapshots.onThisDeviceHint: On this device. Sign in to sync snapshots across devices.
snapshots.noneCloud: No snapshots in your cloud yet.
snapshots.noneLocal: No snapshots saved on this device yet.
snapshots.deletedBoth: Deleted snapshot from the cloud and this device.
snapshots.confirmCloud: Permanently delete the cloud copy? This can't be undone.
snapshots.confirmLocal: Delete this snapshot from this device? This can't be undone.
snapshots.alsoLocal: Also delete the local copy on this device
snapshots.skipped_one: {{count}} snapshot didn't fit your cloud storage.
snapshots.skipped_other: {{count}} snapshots didn't fit your cloud storage.

cloudLogs.deletedBoth: Deleted "{{name}}" from the cloud and this device.
cloudLogs.allOnDevice: All cloud logs are already on this device.
cloudLogs.downloaded_one: Downloaded {{count}} cloud log to this device.
cloudLogs.downloaded_other: Downloaded {{count}} cloud logs to this device.
cloudLogs.signInToManage: Sign in to manage the log files stored in your cloud.
cloudLogs.none: No log files in your cloud yet.
cloudLogs.confirmCloud: Permanently delete the cloud copy? This can't be undone.
cloudLogs.alsoLocal: Also delete the local file from this device (other devices keep their copy)

fileSync.off: Sync this file to the cloud
fileSync.pending: Selected — uploads once you're signed in and online
fileSync.synced: Synced — click to stop syncing (cloud copy is kept)
fileSync.sample: Sample log — kept on every device, no upload needed

fileDelete.alsoCloud: Also delete the synced copy from the cloud backup

autoSync.quotaSaveLocal: Cloud storage is full — saved locally, not synced. Free up space or upgrade in Profile.
autoSync.quotaSomeChanges: Cloud storage is full — some changes didn't sync. Free up space or upgrade in Profile.
autoSync.quotaItems_one: Cloud storage is full — {{count}} item didn't sync.
autoSync.quotaItems_other: Cloud storage is full — {{count}} items didn't sync.
autoSync.quotaSomeItems: Cloud storage is full — some items didn't sync.
autoSync.quotaSnapshots_one: Cloud storage is full — {{count}} snapshot didn't sync. Free up space or upgrade in Profile.
autoSync.quotaSnapshots_other: Cloud storage is full — {{count}} snapshots didn't sync. Free up space or upgrade in Profile.
autoSync.offline: You're offline — changes are saved locally and will sync when you reconnect.
